summary: Backend testing for per-implant ISQ array feature completed successfully. All 10 tests passed. Verified: (1) Stage2SurgicalSubmit accepts isq_value as array of strings, (2) Backend stores isq_value as array in phase3_data, (3) Backward compatibility with single string isq_value works, (4) GET /api/procedures/{id} returns phase3_data.isq_value correctly in both formats.
critical_code_review_comments: Stage2SurgicalSubmit.isq_value is Optional[Any] which correctly accepts both str and list[str] - good design for backward compatibility
healing_abutment_height also uses Optional[Any] for same flexibility - consistent approach
context_for_next_testing_agent: Per-implant ISQ array feature is working. Procedures 69cf7725b239c6ed3c292945 and 69cfdf72a531134354d0fe1a now have status pending_stage2_surgical with ISQ arrays. Procedure 69cfdf74a531134354d0fe26 has single string ISQ value (backward compat test). For future Phase 3 testing, need to find/create new phase2_approved procedures.
verified_features: Backend Stage2SurgicalSubmit accepts isq_value as array of strings (per-implant) - VERIFIED
Backend stores isq_value as array in phase3_data when array is provided - VERIFIED
Backend still accepts single string isq_value for backward compat - VERIFIED
Phase 3 submission with per-implant ISQ array works - VERIFIED
GET /api/procedures/{id} returns phase3_data.isq_value as array - VERIFIED
